calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:39am
Judge Pro Tem John P. Lynch, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeals. Farouk Nakhuda appears as respondent in Pro Per, Anis Nicola Shamiyeh, Esq. appears for appellant Faiq Khoury. Mr. Nakhuda is sworn and testifies in the narrative.Abraham Nakuda, witness for Mr. Nakuda, testifies in response to questions by Mr. Nakuda. Mr. Shamiyeh makes a verbal motion to dismiss the case, which is in turn denied. Mr. Shamiyeh cross-examines Mr. Nakuda. Mr. Shamiyeh presents his case by calling Mr. Khoury as a witness.
No new exhibits were identified or retained.
11:33am
Court adjourns
